title: Complete Web Development Bootcamp
description: Learn full-stack web development from scratch — HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, and Node.js — by building real projects from day one.
whatYouWillLearn: Build responsive websites with HTML5, CSS3 and modern layout techniques
Write clean, modern JavaScript (ES6+) and understand the DOM
Create dynamic single-page apps with React
Build a simple REST API with Node.js and Express
requirements: Willingness to practice by building projects

curriculum.title: Module 5: Building APIs with Node & Express

title: React & Next.js From Zero to Hero
description: Master modern React and the Next.js App Router by building production-grade, full-stack applications with authentication and deployment.
whatYouWillLearn: Architect scalable apps with the Next.js App Router
Implement authentication and protected routes
Work with server components, client components, and server actions
Deploy a production app to the cloud
requirements: Solid understanding of JavaScript and basic React
A code editor such as VS Code

title: Backend Engineering with Node.js & APIs
description: Go beyond the basics and learn how to design, secure, and scale REST APIs with Node.js, Express, and MongoDB.
whatYouWillLearn: Design clean, RESTful API architecture
Secure endpoints with authentication & authorization
Model data effectively with MongoDB
Write automated tests for your APIs

title: Advanced UI/UX Design Masterclass
description: Design beautiful, usable interfaces with confidence — covering design systems, prototyping, and user research methods used by top product teams.
whatYouWillLearn: Build a scalable design system from scratch
Run lightweight user research and usability tests
Prototype interactive flows in Figma
Hand off designs cleanly to developers
requirements: Basic familiarity with any design tool
An eye for detail and willingness to iterate

title: Graphic Design Fundamentals
description: Learn the core principles of color, typography, and layout, and start creating professional-looking graphics for web and print.
whatYouWillLearn: Apply color theory and typography principles confidently
Build clean, balanced layouts
Create social media graphics and simple branding assets
Understand file formats and export settings
requirements: Access to any design tool (free options work fine)

title: Python for Data Science
description: Use Python, Pandas, and NumPy to clean, analyze, and visualize real-world datasets — a practical foundation for any data role.
whatYouWillLearn: Manipulate and clean data efficiently with Pandas
Perform statistical analysis with NumPy
Visualize insights with Matplotlib and Seaborn
Work confidently with real, messy datasets
requirements: Python installed locally or use of an online notebook

title: Machine Learning A-Z
description: A complete, hands-on introduction to machine learning — from regression and classification to neural networks — with real projects, not just theory.
whatYouWillLearn: Understand and apply core ML algorithms
Build and evaluate classification and regression models
Get a practical intro to neural networks
Avoid common pitfalls like overfitting and data leakage

title: Digital Marketing Strategy 2026
description: Build a complete digital marketing strategy covering SEO, content, email, and paid ads — updated for what's actually working in 2026.
whatYouWillLearn: Build a full-funnel digital marketing strategy
Run basic SEO audits and on-page optimization
Plan content and email campaigns that convert
Understand the fundamentals of paid ad platforms
requirements: Interest in growing a brand, product, or business

title: Social Media Marketing Mastery
description: Grow an engaged audience and turn it into measurable results with platform-specific strategies for Instagram, TikTok, and LinkedIn.
whatYouWillLearn: Create platform-specific content strategies
Grow and engage an audience organically
Use analytics to double down on what works
Plan a sustainable, repeatable content calendar
requirements: A social media account on any platform

title: Freelancing & Personal Branding
description: Turn your new skills into income — learn how to find clients, price your work, and build a personal brand that attracts opportunities.
whatYouWillLearn: Define your niche and personal brand positioning
Find and pitch your first freelance clients
Price your services with confidence
Build a simple portfolio that converts
requirements: At least one marketable skill (design, dev, writing, etc.)
Willingness to put yourself out there
